events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: unsupported NM/MC cable runs violate the mandatory support intervals (NEC 334.30/330.30) and physical protection rules (NEC 300.4), with cable also resting on non-permitted supports like ceiling grid. Decision is `fail` with `high` risk — rough-in must stop in the affected area until cable is properly secured, protected at penetrations, and re-inspected before close-in.
